text:
<@U01AD80KMLK> that's the right approach! I mean something even more general. Where a category is the same, but projects have no affiliations at all.

For example, I'm working on the Social Media platform for the open-source communities, but it's leaderobards or contensts I would delegate to this community or to <https://maintaine.rs/>

While, it's UI/frontend is done completely different team at all. And basically it's all tech is built as packages/apps and each of them is independent team not affiliated by each other.
